creator: zi@FreeBSD.org
text:
The README indicates that this port depends on PDF Dissector by
Zynamics, but, I'm unable to find a download link for it on their site:
http://www.zynamics.com/dissector.html

I just see an end of sale notice:
"Please note that there are no current plans to resume sales for
zynamics PDF Dissector."

Please advise,
-r
